nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Due to the risks of AI being inaccurate at times, the work still requires double checking

nodes.label: AI use for sensitive data
nodes.grounding_span: sensitive tasks are all done manually

nodes.label: AI for personalized tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks that require personalization

nodes.label: AI for niche expertise
nodes.grounding_span: advice given by these models are often surface level

nodes.label: AI adherence to instructions
nodes.grounding_span: instructions such as a specific word limit would not be followed

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: it would be incredibly rare for me to spend as much time trying to get the AI to perform the task right compared to how much time I would need to spend getting it done myself

nodes.label: Human backup capability
nodes.grounding_span: there will always need to be a person that can still perform the same tasks

nodes.label: Accuracy and risk mitigation
nodes.grounding_span: Anything of significance to stakeholders such as total revenue figures must be double and triple checked

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks that require personalization

nodes.label: Deep expertise and professional knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: answering inquiries that require specific in-depth, professional knowledge or experience

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Even more time can be saved and much less effort would be required for analytics

nodes.label: Resilience and self-sufficiency
nodes.grounding_span: If there were a power outage or the internet went down, someone still needs to be able to perform the necessary tasks

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: Due to the risks of AI being inaccurate at times, the work still requires double checking

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes find myself getting frustrated with AI's limitations especially regarding generating papers, reports, or even paragraphs

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I foresee an even closer relationship working with AI

nodes.label: Preference for manual handling of enjoyable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I avoid using AI for tasks such as answering inquiries that require specific in-depth, professional knowledge or experience

nodes.label: Risk-based task delegation — distinguishes high-risk from low-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Due to the risks of AI being inaccurate at times, the work still requires double checking and sensitive tasks are all done manually

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'll often find myself getting trapped in a loop of try agains and undos... Often I would take what is generated and edit it myself
